name: The Back Nine Golf | Mt Juliet, TN
address: 1917 N Mt Juliet Rd #102, Mt. Juliet, TN 37122
about: The Back Nine Golf in Mt Juliet, TN, is a golf simulator venue that offers a tech-driven experience for golfers. The facility provides multiple bays for simulated golf play, though specific technology details are limited. Pricing is available in a range that reflects a mid-to-premium experience, making it suitable for various skill levels and group sizes.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple simulator bays for group play or individual sessions
Premium golf simulation technology for realistic play
Flexible pricing options for different budgets
Convenient location in Mt Juliet, TN

food_and_drink.notes: Food options available at the venue

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue, but you can bring your own if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and drink options, but external items may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: Typically, an 18-hole simulation takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator software and player pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Back Nine Golf is kid-friendly and welcomes families and juniors.
